steps.title: Find the shared ratio
steps.content: Use the first equation to isolate the repeated ratio: $\frac{a}{b}=\frac{8.25}{5}=1.65$.

steps.title: Substitute into the second equation
steps.content: Substitute that value into the second equation: $\frac{1.65}{n}=33$.

steps.title: Solve for the variable
steps.content: Multiply by $n$, then divide by $33$: $1.65=33n$, so $n=\frac{1.65}{33}=0.05$. The answer is .05.
